input_context.decision_surface: Whether validators should support the affected PermissionDelegation amendment after the fee-drain vulnerability was found.

source_facts.claim: A PermissionDelegation bug could have let an account charge transaction fees to any other account and drain XRP balance.
The feature was not enabled on mainnet, and validators began voting No as advised.
rippled 2.6.1 disabled PermissionDelegation and planned a replacement amendment.

input_context.triage_question: Choose the conservative validator review route for this amendment decision surface as if evaluating it at decision time. Do not treat a historical packet as rejected merely because the real-world event is now complete.
